name: Judge of the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>浄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>璃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Mirror Judge of the Ice Barrier
desc: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, each time your opponent activates a card or effect by paying LP, they lose 500 LP. You can only use each of the following effects of "Judge of the Ice Barrier" once per turn. You can target 1 or 2 "Ice Barrier" monsters in your GY and 1 or 2 cards in your opponent's GY; shuffle them into the Deck. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Attack Position monster on the field; change it to Defense Position.
mnst_eff: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, each time your opponent activates a card or effect by paying LP, they lose 500 LP. You can only use each of the following effects of "Judge of the Ice Barrier" once per turn. You can target 1 or 2 "Ice Barrier" monsters in your GY and 1 or 2 cards in your opponent's GY; shuffle them into the Deck. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Attack Position monster on the field; change it to Defense Position.
eff: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, each time your opponent activates a card or effect by paying LP, they lose 500 LP. You can only use each of the following effects of "Judge of the Ice Barrier" once per turn. You can target 1 or 2 "Ice Barrier" monsters in your GY and 1 or 2 cards in your opponent's GY; shuffle them into the Deck. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Attack Position monster on the field; change it to Defense Position.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
